name: 大连
description: Dalian, a coastal city in Liaoning province, is known for its European architecture, beautiful coastal scenery, and vibrant Russian and Japanese influence. The city features clean beaches, modern urban planning, and the famous Xinghai Square.
highlights: Xinghai Square - Largest city square in Asia

climate.tips: Best in summer for beaches. Spring and autumn are pleasant. Winters are cold but not extreme. Summer is peak tourist season.

attractions.name: 星海广场
attractions.description: Largest city square in Asia, featuring the city's best waterfront views.
attractions.tips: Best at sunset or night. Walk to the music fountain. Take photos with the giant book sculpture.

attractions.name: 金石滩
attractions.description: Scenic coastal area with golden beaches, rock formations, and theme parks.
attractions.tips: Take bus 5 or tourist bus from city center. Combine with Discoveryland.

attractions.name: 老虎滩海洋公园
attractions.description: Large ocean park with marine shows, aquariums and amusement rides.
attractions.tips: Arrive early for shows. Buy tickets online. Full day attraction.

attractions.name: 俄罗斯风情街
attractions.description: Historic street with Russian colonial architecture from early 1900s.
attractions.tips: Best in morning for photos. Buy Russian products. Combine with nearby Japanese Street.

attractions.name: 日本风情街
attractions.description: Historic street with Japanese colonial architecture and traditional buildings.
attractions.tips: Beautiful in spring. Take photos with Japanese-style buildings. Find Japanese restaurants.

attractions.name: 棒棰岛
attractions.description: Scenic island with beautiful beach and golf course, once a state guesthouse.
attractions.tips: Take tourist bus or taxi. Beach is beautiful but crowded in summer.

attractions.name: 大连森林动物园
attractions.description: Large zoo with natural environment for animals, featuring pandas and rare species.
attractions.tips: Arrive early. Take cable car for views. Great for families.

attractions.name: 付家庄海滨浴场
attractions.description: Popular city beach with clear water and scenic surrounding hills.
attractions.tips: Best in summer. Bring sunscreen. Take bus 5 or 702.

attractions.name: 大连海滨路
attractions.description: Scenic coastal road with ocean views, connecting major attractions.
attractions.tips: Drive or take tourist bus. Best viewpoints at沿途. Stop for photos.

attractions.name: 大连星海湾跨海大桥
attractions.description: Modern cross-sea bridge offering panoramic views of the bay.
attractions.tips: Best at sunset. Walk across or drive. Combine with Xinghai Square.

attractions.name: 大连发现王国主题公园
attractions.description: Large theme park with European-style architecture and thrill rides.
attractions.tips: Full day attraction. Arrive at opening. Wear comfortable shoes.

attractions.name: 劳动公园
attractions.description: Large urban park in city center with cherry blossoms and city views.
attractions.tips: Best in spring for cherry blossoms. Take cable car to viewing tower.

attractions.name: 大连博物馆
attractions.description: Modern museum showcasing city's history, culture and natural heritage.
attractions.tips: Allow 2 hours. Audio guide available. Combine with Xinghai Square.

attractions.name: 大连女子骑警基地
attractions.description: Unique base for all-female police cavalry, with horse shows and exhibitions.
attractions.tips: Check show times. Great for children. Take photos with horses.

attractions.name: 黑石礁
attractions.description: Coastal area with unique black rock formations and tide pools.
attractions.tips: Best at low tide. Come for sunrise. Explore tide pools.

attractions.name: 大连夜景
attractions.description: Best viewpoints for Dalian's illuminated skyline at night.
attractions.tips: Best from Pearl Lake or mountain viewing points. Take night tour bus.

attractions.name: 中山广场
attractions.description: Historic circular square surrounded by European architecture from various countries.
attractions.tips: Best for architecture photography. Surrounding buildings from 10+ countries.

attractions.name: 金石滩国家旅游度假区
attractions.description: Large coastal resort area with beaches, golf courses and theme parks.
attractions.tips: Book resort hotel for multiple days. Rent car to explore. Take tourist bus.

attractions.name: 大连自然博物馆
attractions.description: Museum with exhibits on dinosaurs, marine life and local ecosystems.
attractions.tips: Great for families. Allow 2 hours. Combine with nearby attractions.

attractions.name: 东海公园
attractions.description: Coastal park with scenic cliffs, unusual rock formations and ocean views.
attractions.tips: Wear hiking shoes. Best in morning. The views are spectacular.

attractions.name: 大连奥林匹克广场
attractions.description: Large square built for Dalian's Olympic bid, featuring sports themes.
attractions.tips: Best at night with lighting. Take photos with statues.

attractions.name: 海之韵公园
attractions.description: Coastal park with unique marine-themed sculptures and ocean views.
attractions.tips: Best at sunrise or sunset. Combine with coastal road drive.

attractions.name: 大连港
attractions.description: Historic port area with European architecture and ferry services.
attractions.tips: Take ferry to Lvshun or Yantai. Explore old port area.

attractions.name: 白玉山
attractions.description: Mountain with panoramic views of Dalian and the naval base.
attractions.tips: Take cable car up. Views are spectacular. Combine with Lvshun.

attractions.name: 星海广场
attractions.description: 亚洲最大的城市广场，面积176万平方米，有百年纪念雕塑。

attractions.name: 老虎滩海洋公园
attractions.description: 中国最大的海洋主题公园之一，有极地馆、珊瑚馆等。
attractions.address: 大连市中山区滨海中路

attractions.name: 金石滩
attractions.description: 国家级风景名胜区，有奇石、海滩和高尔夫球场。

attractions.name: 棒棰岛
attractions.description: 大连最美的海滩之一，曾是国家领导人疗养地。

attractions.name: 大连天主教堂
attractions.description: 哥特式建筑，是大连最古老的教堂之一。

attractions.name: 大连现代博物馆
attractions.description: 展示大连近代历史和城市发展的博物馆。

attractions.name: 星海公园
attractions.description: 大连著名的海滨公园，有沙滩和海上乐园。

attractions.name: 东港商务区
attractions.description: 大连新城区，有音乐喷泉和现代建筑。

attractions.name: 旅顺口
attractions.description: 中国近代史上的重要军事要塞，有日俄监狱旧址。

attractions.name: 白玉山
attractions.description: 旅顺口的标志性山峰，可俯瞰旅顺军港。

attractions.name: 大连森林动物园
attractions.description: 中国最大的森林动物园之一，有散养区和圈养区。

attractions.name: 棒棰岛海滩
attractions.description: 大连最干净的海滩，水质清澈。

attractions.name: 大连贝壳博物馆
attractions.description: 中国最大的贝壳博物馆，有5000多种贝壳。

attractions.name: 大连新华书店
attractions.description: 大连最大的书店，有独特的建筑设计。

attractions.name: 大连夜景
attractions.description: 星海湾和东港的夜景灯光秀。

attractions.name: 俄罗斯风情街
attractions.description: 保留了俄式建筑的商业街，有俄罗斯商品。

attractions.name: 日本风情街
attractions.description: 保留了日式建筑的商业街。

attractions.name: 老虎滩海滩
attractions.description: 大连著名的海滩，有细软的沙滩。

attractions.name: 大连极地馆
attractions.description: 有白鲸、海豚等极地海洋动物。

attractions.name: 星海湾跨海大桥
attractions.description: 中国首座海上地锚悬索桥，全长6.8公里。

attractions.name: 大连美术馆
attractions.description: 展示中外美术作品的美术馆。

attractions.name: 大连植物园
attractions.description: 大连市区的绿色氧吧，有各种植物。

attractions.name: 旅顺博物馆
attractions.description: 中国最早的博物馆之一，有珍贵的历史文物。

attractions.name: 大连发现王国
attractions.description: 大型主题乐园，有过山车等游乐设施。

attractions.name: 付家庄海滨浴场
attractions.description: 大连最受欢迎的海水浴场之一。

attractions.name: 老虎滩极地馆
attractions.description: 大连最大的极地海洋动物展示馆。

arrival.tips: Airport 12km from city center. Airport bus (10¥) or taxi (50¥) to city.

arrival.to: Dalian Railway Station / Dalian North Station
arrival.tips: Dalian North for high-speed. Both stations have metro connections.

culturalTips.title: Seafood Culture
culturalTips.content: Dalian is famous for fresh seafood. Must-try: steamed crab, salt shrimp, grilled fish, and sea urchin. The city has many seafood markets where you can pick and have food cooked.

culturalTips.title: Russian and Japanese Heritage
culturalTips.content: Dalian was under Russian and Japanese control in early 20th century. The Russian Style Street and Japanese Style Street still show this colonial heritage with unique architecture.

culturalTips.title: Coastal City
culturalTips.content: Dalian has beautiful beaches including Fujiazhuang, Jinshi Beach, and Bangchui Island. Summer is peak season for beach activities and water sports.

culturalTips.title: Menzi (焖子)
culturalTips.content: Pan-fried menzi is an iconic Dalian street snack made from starch. Find it at street vendors, especially near the old streets. Topped with garlic sauce and soy sauce.

culturalTips.title: European Architecture
culturalTips.content: Zhongshan Square and surrounding streets feature European architecture from various countries, making Dalian feel like a European city in parts.

culturalTips.title: Clean City
culturalTips.content: Dalian is known for its clean streets and urban planning. The city has won awards for environmental improvements and green spaces.

culturalTips.title: Gaba Shrimp
culturalTips.content: Spicy raw shrimp (嘎巴虾) is a unique Dalian snack. The shrimp is marinated alive in spicy sauce and eaten whole. An acquired taste!

culturalTips.title: Port City Heritage
culturalTips.content: Dalian has been a major port since Russian times. The port area still shows historical buildings and the city has strong maritime heritage.

culturalTips.title: Dalian Dialect
culturalTips.content: Dalian dialect is similar to standard Mandarin but with some unique expressions. Locals are known for being direct and friendly.

culturalTips.title: Getting Around
culturalTips.content: Dalian has a modern tram system and metro. The coastal scenic area is best explored by tourist bus or taxi. Bicycles are available but hilly terrain makes walking challenging.

culturalTips.title: Russian Products
culturalTips.content: Buy Russian chocolate, vodka, and souvenirs at the Russian Style Street. Also find local seafood products and dried seafood as souvenirs.

culturalTips.title: Nightlife
culturalTips.content: Dalian has vibrant nightlife around Xinghai Square and the beach areas. Many bars and clubs cater to both locals and tourists.

culturalTips.title: Mountain and Sea Views
culturalTips.content: Dalian uniquely combines mountain and sea scenery. The coastal road offers spectacular views and there are hiking trails in the hills behind the city.

culturalTips.title: Education Hub
culturalTips.content: Dalian has several universities and is known for education. The city attracts students from across China and internationally.

culturalTips.title: Fashion City
culturalTips.content: Dalian hosts international fashion events and is known for its fashion industry. The city has a modern, cosmopolitan feel.

culturalTips.title: Cherry Blossoms
culturalTips.content: Dalian has Japanese cherry trees that bloom in spring. The Japanese Style Street is particularly beautiful during cherry blossom season.

quickFacts.water: Tap water safe after boiling; bottled water recommended
